problems.title: IN 子查询
problems.description: 查询选修了数学课程的学生。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

tables.name: courses
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE courses (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

tables.name: enrollments
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE enrollments (student_id INT, course_id INT)

problems.answer: SELECT * FROM students WHERE id IN (SELECT student_id FROM enrollments WHERE course_id = (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE name = '数学'));
problems.expectedResult: 返回选修了数学的学生
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确使用 IN 子查询

problems.title: EXISTS 子查询
problems.description: 查询有选课记录的学生。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

tables.name: enrollments
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE enrollments (student_id INT, course_id INT)

problems.answer: SELECT * FROM students s WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enrollments e WHERE e.student_id = s.id);
problems.expectedResult: 返回有选课记录的学生
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确使用 EXISTS 子查询

problems.title: 比较运算符子查询
problems.description: 查询年龄大于平均年龄的学生。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT)

problems.requirement: 使用 > 比较运算符和子查询。
problems.answer: SELECT * FROM students WHERE age > (SELECT AVG(age) FROM students);
problems.expectedResult: 返回年龄大于平均年龄的学生
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确使用比较运算符子查询

problems.title: ALL 子查询
problems.description: 查询年龄比所有女生都大的男生。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.answer: SELECT * FROM students WHERE gender = '男' AND age > ALL (SELECT age FROM students WHERE gender = '女');
problems.expectedResult: 返回年龄比所有女生都大的男生
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确使用 ALL 子查询

problems.title: ANY 子查询
problems.description: 查询年龄比任意一个女生大的男生。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.answer: SELECT * FROM students WHERE gender = '男' AND age > ANY (SELECT age FROM students WHERE gender = '女');
problems.expectedResult: 返回年龄比任意一个女生大的男生
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确使用 ANY 子查询

problems.title: FROM 子查询
problems.description: 查询每个班级的平均年龄，然后查询平均年龄大于20的班级。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, class_id INT)

problems.requirement: 使用 FROM 子查询（派生表）。
problems.answer: SELECT * FROM (SELECT class_id, AVG(age) AS avg_age FROM students GROUP BY class_id) AS class_avg WHERE avg_age > 20;
problems.expectedResult: 返回平均年龄大于20的班级
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确使用 FROM 子查询

problems.title: SELECT 子查询
problems.description: 查询学生信息，并显示其所在班级名称（使用 SELECT 子查询）。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), class_id INT)

tables.name: classes
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE classes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

problems.requirement: 在 SELECT 子句中使用子查询。
problems.answer: SELECT id, name, (SELECT name FROM classes WHERE id = students.class_id) AS class_name FROM students;
problems.expectedResult: 返回学生信息及班级名称
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确使用 SELECT 子查询

problems.title: 嵌套子查询
problems.description: 查询选修了所有课程的学生。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

tables.name: courses
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE courses (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

tables.name: enrollments
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE enrollments (student_id INT, course_id INT)

problems.requirement: 使用嵌套 NOT EXISTS 子查询。
problems.answer: SELECT * FROM students s WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM courses c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM enrollments e WHERE e.student_id = s.id AND e.course_id = c.id));
problems.expectedResult: 返回选修了所有课程的学生
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确使用嵌套子查询

problems.title: 子查询与 JOIN 结合
problems.description: 查询学生及其最高成绩的课程信息。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

tables.name: scores
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE scores (student_id INT, course_name VARCHAR(50), score INT)

problems.answer: SELECT s.name, sc.course_name, sc.score FROM students s INNER JOIN scores sc ON s.id = sc.student_id INNER JOIN (SELECT student_id, MAX(score) AS max_score FROM scores GROUP BY student_id) AS max_sc ON s.id = max_sc.student_id AND sc.score = max_sc.max_score;
problems.expectedResult: 返回学生及其最高成绩的课程
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确结合子查询和 JOIN

problems.title: 复杂子查询
problems.description: 查询每个班级中年龄最大的学生。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, class_id INT)

problems.requirement: 使用子查询找出每个班级的最大年龄，然后关联查询。
problems.answer: SELECT s.* FROM students s INNER JOIN (SELECT class_id, MAX(age) AS max_age FROM students GROUP BY class_id) AS class_max ON s.class_id = class_max.class_id AND s.age = class_max.max_age;
problems.expectedResult: 返回每个班级中年龄最大的学生
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确使用复杂子查询
